title: Prefer tag over ARIA role
description:
ARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) roles are used to make web content and web applications more accessible to people with disabilities. However, you should not use an ARIA role on a generic element (like span or div) if there is a semantic HTML tag with similar functionality, just use that tag instead. For example, instead of using a div element with a button role (
Click me
), you should just use a button element ().
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Use semantic HTML elements instead of ARIA roles when possible.
Use semantic HTML elements instead of generic elements with ARIA roles.
